sentences.target: 公園に大勢の子供たちが遊んでいる。
sentences.reading: こうえんにおおぜいのこどもたちがあそんでいる。

translations.en: Many children are playing in the park.
translations.es: Muchos niños están jugando en el parque.
translations.fr: Beaucoup d’enfants jouent dans le parc.
translations.zh-Hans: 许多孩子在公园里玩耍。
translations.pt: Muitas crianças estão brincando no parque.
translations.vi: Nhiều trẻ em đang chơi trong công viên.
translations.ar: يلعب العديد من الأطفال في الحديقة.
translations.nl: Veel kinderen spelen in het park.
translations.hi: पार्क में कई बच्चे खेल रहे हैं।
translations.pl: Wiele dzieci bawi się w parku.
translations.ro: Mulți copii se joacă în parc.
translations.cs: Mnoho dětí si hraje v parku.

tokens.explanation: location where the action takes place
marks the location where the action occurs
indicates a large number of people
connects the quantity expression to the noun
the people who are playing
plural marker for animate nouns
marks the subject performing the action
te-formof'遊ぶ',linkingtotheauxiliaryverb
indicates ongoing action

sentences.target: 駅前に大勢の人が待っている。
sentences.reading: えきまえにおおぜいのひとがまっている。

translations.en: Many people are waiting in front of the station.
translations.es: Mucha gente espera frente a la estación.
translations.fr: Beaucoup de gens attendent devant la gare.
translations.de: Viele Menschen warten vor dem Bahnhof.
translations.it: Molte persone stanno aspettando davanti alla stazione.
translations.ko: 많은 사람들이 역 앞에서 기다리고 있습니다.
translations.yue: 好多人喺車站門口等緊
translations.pt: Muitas pessoas estão esperando em frente à estação.
translations.vi: Nhiều người đang chờ đợi trước nhà ga.
translations.ar: الكثير من الناس ينتظرون أمام المحطة.
translations.nl: Veel mensen wachten voor het station.
translations.hi: कई लोग स्टेशन के सामने इंतजार कर रहे हैं।
translations.pl: Wiele osób czeka przed stacją stacji.
translations.el: Πολύς κόσμος περιμένει μπροστά από το σταθμό.
translations.id: Banyak orang menunggu di depan stasiun.
translations.ro: Mulți oameni așteaptă în fața gării.

tokens.explanation: location (area in front of the station)
marks the location of the waiting
indicates a large number of people
links the quantity to the noun
the people who are waiting
marks the subject performing the action
te-formof'待つ',connectstotheauxiliary'いる'
indicates ongoing action

sentences.target: 教室に大勢の学生が入ってきた。
sentences.reading: きょうしつにおおぜいのがくせいがはいってきた。

translations.en: A lot of students came into the classroom.
translations.fr: Beaucoup d’élèves sont venus en classe.
translations.it: Molti studenti sono entrati in classe.
translations.pt: Muitos alunos entraram na sala de aula.
translations.vi: Rất nhiều học sinh đã đến lớp học.
translations.ar: دخل الكثير من الطلاب إلى الصف.
translations.nl: Veel leerlingen kwamen het klaslokaal binnen.
translations.hu: Sok diák jött be az osztályterembe.
translations.hi: बहुत सारे छात्र कक्षा में आए।
translations.nb: Mange elever kom inn i klasserommet.
translations.sv: Många elever kom in i klassrummet.
translations.ro: Mulți elevi au venit în clasă.
translations.da: Mange elever kom ind i klasseværelset.

tokens.explanation: location where people enter
marks the destination of movement
indicates a large number
links the numeral expression to the noun
people entering the classroom
marks the subject performing the verb
te-formof'入る',connectstotheauxiliary'くる'
indicates movement toward the speaker, completing the compound verb

sentences.target: 映画館には大勢の観客が並んでいた。
sentences.reading: えいがかんにはおおぜいのかんきゃくがならんでいた。

translations.en: Many spectators lined up at the movie theater.
translations.es: Muchos espectadores hicieron cola en el cine.
translations.fr: De nombreux spectateurs faisaient la queue au cinéma.
translations.de: Viele Zuschauer stellten sich am Kino an.
translations.it: Molti spettatori si schierarono al cinema.
translations.zh-Hans: 许多观众排队在电影院前。
translations.yue: 好多觀眾喺電影院排隊。
translations.ru: Многие зрители выстроились в очередь у кинотеатра.
translations.pt: Muitos espectadores se alinharam no cinema.
translations.tr: Birçok seyirci sinema salonunda sıraya girdi.
translations.vi: Nhiều khán giả xếp hàng tại rạp chiếu phim.
translations.ar: اصطف العديد من المتفرجين في السينما.
translations.nl: Veel toeschouwers stonden in de rij bij de bioscoop.
translations.hu: Sok néző sorban állt a moziban.
translations.hi: कई दर्शक मूवी थिएटर में लाइन में खड़े थे।
translations.pl: Wielu widzów ustawiło się w kolejce przed kinem.
translations.nb: Mange tilskuere stilte seg i kø ved kinosalen.
translations.sv: Många åskådare stod i kö vid biografen.
translations.ro: Mulți spectatori s-au aliniat la cinematograf.
translations.cs: Mnoho diváků stálo frontu u kina.
translations.da: Mange tilskuere stillede sig i kø ved biografen.

tokens.explanation: location where people line up
marks the location
marks'映画館に'asthetopicwithcontrastivenuance
indicates a large number of people
links the count to the noun
the people standing in line
marks the subject of the verb
te-formof'並ぶ',connectingtotheauxiliaryverb
past continuous, indicates ongoing past action

えいがかんにはおおぜいのかんきゃくがならんでいた。
